title: Fauna Document
description: Represents a document in a Fauna collection. Documents are the primary data unit in Fauna and consist of fields with values. Each document belongs to a collection and has a unique reference identifier, creation timestamp, and transaction timestamp.

id.description: Unique identifier for the document within its collection.

coll.description: The name of the collection this document belongs to.

ts.description: Transaction timestamp in microseconds since the Unix epoch representing the last time this document was modified.

data.description: The user-defined fields and values stored in this document. Field names and types are defined by the collection schema.

DocumentReference.description: A reference to a Fauna document by its collection and ID.

id.description: Unique identifier of the referenced document.

coll.description: Collection name of the referenced document.

NamedDocument.description: A system document referenced by name rather than ID, such as collections, indexes, and roles.

name.description: The unique name of the system document.

coll.description: The system collection this document belongs to, such as Collection, Index, or Role.

ts.description: Transaction timestamp of the last modification.
